2604.15882.title: JFinTEB: Japanese Financial Text Embedding Benchmark
2604.15882.paper_summary: We introduce JFinTEB, the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed for evaluating Japanese financial text embeddings. Existing embedding benchmarks provide limited coverage of language-specific and domain-specific aspects found in Japanese financial texts. Our benchmark encompasses diverse task categories including retrieval and classification tasks that reflect realistic and well-defined financial text processing scenarios. The retrieval tasks leverage instruction-following datasets and financial text generation queries, while classification tasks cover sentiment analysis, document categorization, and domain-specific classification challenges derived from economic survey data. We conduct extensive evaluations across a wide range of embedding models, including Japanese-specific models of various sizes, multilingual models, and commercial embedding services. We publicly release JFinTEB datasets and evaluation framework at https://github.com/retarfi/JFinTEB to facilitate future research and provide a standardized evaluation protocol for the Japanese financial text mining community. This work addresses a critical gap in Japanese financial text processing resources and establishes a foundation for advancing domain-specific embedding research.
2604.15882.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 JFinTEB，這是第一個專門設計用於評估日本金融文本嵌入的綜合基準。現有的嵌入基準對於日本金融文本中的語言特定和領域特定方面的覆蓋有限。我們的基準涵蓋了多樣的任務類別，包括反映現實且明確的金融文本處理場景的檢索和分類任務。檢索任務利用遵循指令的數據集和金融文本生成查詢，而分類任務則涵蓋情感分析、文件分類以及源自經濟調查數據的領域特定分類挑戰。我們對各種嵌入模型進行了廣泛的評估，包括各種大小的日本特定模型、多語言模型和商業嵌入服務。我們在 https://github.com/retarfi/JFinTEB 上公開發布 JFinTEB 數據集和評估框架，以促進未來的研究並為日本金融文本挖掘社群提供標準化的評估協議。這項工作填補了日本金融文本處理資源中的一個關鍵空白，並為推進領域特定嵌入研究奠定了基礎。
2604.15882.author: Masahiro Suzuki et.al.
